Enumerate a component's execution history from the catalog-local index.

Rows are sorted newest-first and capped at --limit (default 50). The trigger,
profile, and environment filters narrow the set. A component that has never
executed prints an empty history and exits 0.

Examples:
  orun catalog history api-edge
  orun catalog history api-edge --source main
  orun catalog history api-edge --trigger github-push-main
  orun catalog history api-edge --limit 10 --json

Exit codes:
  0  History rendered (possibly empty).
  1  Invalid selector or missing component argument.
  3  StateStore failure.
  6  Catalog not found.

Usage:
  orun catalog history <component> [flags]

Flags:
      --catalog-snapshot string   Bypass refs; pin to an explicit catalogSnapshotKey
      --catalog-source string     Resolve catalog by ref selector (current|main|latest|branches/<name>|prs/<n>|cat-<key>)
      --environment string        Only executions in this environment
      --json                      Stable machine-readable output
      --limit int                 Maximum number of rows (default 50)
      --profile string            Only executions of this profile
      --source string             Alias for --catalog-source
      --trigger string            Only executions from this trigger

Global Flags:
      --all                 Disable CWD-based component scoping; process all components
  -c, --config-dir string   Config directory for JobRegistry definitions (or set ORUN_CONFIG_DIR; use * or ** for recursive scanning)
  -i, --intent string       Intent file path (auto-discovered if not set) (default "intent.yaml")
